overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a vibrant natural landscape. The scene transitions from open meadows with distant mountain views to a densely forested riverside trail during a colorful sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path with mountain views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant mountains, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: snow-capped mountains visible in the distance against the colorful sky
winding dirt trail with patches of grass and stones
deciduous trees with green foliage scattered across the meadow
large boulder and rock outcrop on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a wide meadow with a dirt path leading toward distant mountains. The sky is partly cloudy with warm golden hour lighting. Scattered trees and rock formations dot the landscape, and wildflowers are visible along the path edges.

events.description: path curves left entering denser tree cover with mountains still visible ahead
river becomes visible on the right side of the path through the trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt follows the curving path leftward as the landscape transitions from open meadow to forested area

entered.detail: calm river water visible through gaps in the trees on the right
thick cluster of trees ahead blocking the distant view

segments.scene_description: As the path curves left, the scene transitions from open meadow to forest edge. The mountains fade from view as dense trees enclose the path. A river becomes visible on the right side, and the lighting becomes more diffused as tree cover increases.

events.description: walking alongside the river with water clearly visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path with the river flowing to his right through the forested landscape

entered.detail: grassy and rocky riverbank lining the water's edge
tall deciduous trees with thick trunks lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path runs alongside the river, with water clearly visible on the right and dense forest on both sides. Tall trees line the route, creating a more enclosed feeling. The ground remains a dirt trail with patches of grass and wildflowers.

events.description: entering darker forest area with heavy tree cover blocking most of the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the densely wooded area with the river no longer visible and limited sky overhead

entered.detail: dense bushes and low vegetation on the left side of the path
thick underbrush and ferns on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the deep forest interior where the canopy blocks most of the sky, creating darker lighting conditions. The river is no longer visible as the path winds through dense vegetation and tall trees close in on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a wide, sunlit meadow gradually transforms into a dense, shadowed forest interior. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through an open landscape of wildflowers and rock formations under a warm, golden hour sky with distant mountains. As the path curves left, the mountains fade from view and the open terrain shifts toward a forest edge where a river appears on the right and the lighting becomes more diffused. The scene then follows the trail as it runs alongside the flowing water, enclosed by tall trees that increasingly narrow the horizon. Finally, the path winds deep into the forest interior, where the river disappears and the thick canopy blocks the sky to create a dark, secluded atmosphere.
